title: The Toxic Avenger Part III: The Last Temptation of Toxie
original_title: The Toxic Avenger Part III: The Last Temptation of Toxie
overview: Desperate to raise money for the experimental surgery that could restore his blind fiancee's eyesight, Toxie accepts a lucrative job with the evil multinational conglomerate Apocalypse Inc.
